issue.message: This declaration is annotated with @Composable but doesn't call any other @Composable functions or read any @Composable properties (like a CompositionLocal's current), so it doesn't use the composition and the @Composable annotation can be removed. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#remove-unnecessary-composable-annotations for more information.

This declaration is annotated with @Composable but doesn't call any other @Composable functions or read any @Composable properties (like a CompositionLocal's current), so it doesn't use the composition and the @Composable annotation can be removed. See https://slackhq.github.io/compose-lints/rules/#remove-unnecessary-composable-annotations for more information.
